title: Fullbright SP
description: Fullbright SP texture pack (Sodium with PolyTone)
body:
**Fullbright SP texture pack (Sodium with PolyTone)** is a resource pack that adjusts the brightness levels in Minecraft so that you as a player have clear vision at all times. This allows you to see better in dark caves or outdoors at night.
It is important to note that you need two mods: [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [PolyTone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone). You can easily add these to your existing mods.
Why Fullbright and not a "Night Vision" Although both have similar functions, Fullbright is significantly brighter and offers an even clearer view.

--- ⚠️ In version _1.21.5_, it may happen that [PolyTone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) does not recognize the resources if the resource pack is changed during gameplay. In this case, Minecraft should be restarted along with the resource pack. After that, [PolyTone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) should detect the resources correctly. ---

⚠️ **Need Help? Refer to the Document!**
[Docs / FAQ](https://blog.worldresourcepack.com/blog/fullbright-faq)

If you require assistance with installing or using the Fullbright resource pack, feel free to consult this [docs](https://blog.worldresourcepack.com/blog/fullbright-faq). Here, you'll find step-by-step instructions for installation as well as tips and tricks for maximizing the use of the resource pack. If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact our community, e.g. via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/a5jCWbvvrZ) or contact our [support team](/support/contact-support).
